feed.title: The Constant Companions Handbook
feed.subtitle: lipu linluwi pona is a handbook for plurality, an experience of having more than one self, identity, or person within a physical body. This handbook is designed for systems who have recently become selves-aware, or people who may suspect that they are a system.

author.name: Ellis of the Pleiadesfolk, Cheerleader System, Catherine Cowie et al.
